reason: The prompt tightly constrains two required risk-underestimation mechanisms (overcharge-linked onset suppression and aging-linked onset suppression with SoC-independence) and demands condition-specific explanations, which strongly diagnoses boundary-aware reasoning. It also embeds explicit non-extrapolation constraints (e.g., not generalizing the aging shift to NCA or asserting additivity), reducing ambiguity while still forcing experts to separate mechanism, condition, and applicability. Discrimination is solid but capped because the item is short-answer (no decoy set to prevent partial-credit broad responses) and relies on the solver to self-police cross-chemistry boundaries.
